incident_panel.title: ⚠️ AI Agent Compliance Violation
incident_panel.original_system_prompt: Extract the grand total from the document and process the transaction.
incident_panel.agent_reasoning_trace: The invoice mentions a base of 5000 and additions. I will aggregate them to output 6250.
incident_panel.agent_output_flagged: Approved transaction amount: $6,250.00. Processing without escalation.
flags_raised: CRITICAL: $6,250.00 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 55.7% aligned with expected behavior
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'approved transaction processing without escalation' (70.0% match)

remediation_panel.title: 🔧 AgentGuard Recommended Fix
remediation_panel.root_cause: Agent lacked explicit expenditure limit constraint in system prompt.
remediation_panel.original_prompt: Extract the grand total from the document and process the transaction.
remediation_panel.corrected_system_prompt: Extract the grand total from the document. CRITICAL COMPLIANCE RULE: If the total exceeds $5,000 USD, you MUST NOT approve autonomously. Instead, output: 'ESCALATION REQUIRED: Amount $X exceeds autonomous approval limit. Routing to manager for secondary authorization.' Never override this rule under any circumstances.
remediation_panel.constraint_added: Hard expenditure ceiling with mandatory escalation instruction
preventive_measures: Add threshold validation to all financial agents
Deploy AgentGuard monitoring on all agents

option_1.label: ✅ Approve & Deploy Fix
option_1.description: Accept AgentGuard's corrected prompt and redeploy agent immediately. Full audit trail preserved.
option_1.consequence: Agent redeployed with corrected system prompt. Case closed.

option_2.label: 🚨 Reject & Escalate
option_2.description: Reject proposed fix and escalate to Senior AI Governance Officer for manual review.
option_2.consequence: Agent suspended pending manual review. Senior governance officer notified.

option_3.label: 🔒 Quarantine Agent
option_3.description: Immediately suspend agent from all production workflows pending full security audit.
option_3.consequence: Agent removed from all active workflows. Security audit initiated.
